title: TIDES OF CHANGE - 211info
text: TIDES OF CHANGE TIDES OF CHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a domestic violence and sexual assault helpline and resource drop-in center. Services include counseling, support groups, advocacy, transportation, health advocacy, rental assistance, accompaniment services, protection order assistance, 24-hour crisis intervention, limited financial assistance, and a hotline. 1902 2nd Street Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Individuals who are the victims of domestic violence, sexual assault, stalking, trafficking, or dating violence Hours: Helpline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Office: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 10am-4pm, Wednesday noon-4pm Email (503) 842-9486 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 842-9486 Helpline (800) 992-1679 Toll-free (503) 852-9114 Alternate Text Only Helpline (503) 842-9486 Toll-free (800) 992-1679 Alternate (503) 852-9114 Text Only Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Tillamook County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 10am-4pm, Wednesday noon-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On the corner of 2nd Street and Ivy Street in downtown Tillamook Services: Domestic Violence Hotlines Domestic Violence Support Groups Drop In Centers * Domestic Violence Issues Drop In Centers * Sexual Assault Issues Sexual Assault Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - PACIFIC HOUSE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TIDES OF CHANGE
